questionHtml: The recommended daily intake of vitamin D is 15 μg. This student consumed just 4 μg. State two potential health consequences of vitamin D deficiency.
markschemeHtml:
a. poor bone mineralization 

b. rickets/osteoporosis/osteomalacia 

c. poor absorption of dietary calcium

Allow for other verifiable answers.

meta.title: The recommended daily intake of vitamin D is 15 μg. This student consumed just 4 μg. State two potential health consequences of vitamin D deficiency.
